The privacy-filter dispatcher used broad substring matching on the user-supplied `model_name` parameter, allowing a value such as `attacker/foo-privacy-filter-bar` to route through a path that loads Hugging Face models with `trust_remote_code=True`. An unauthenticated attacker can supply a malicious model repository containing custom Transformers code via auto_map in `config.json` or `tokenizer_config.json`, which is imported and executed with the privileges of the OpenMed service process.", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00915, "percentile": 0.55751}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-m3v4-v5gx-7wf5", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-06-30T21:42:32Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m3v4-v5gx-7wf5", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-m3v4-v5gx-7wf5"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-47117"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-06-02T16:16:43Z", "published_at": "2026-06-02T18:31:33Z", "references": ["https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-47117", "https://github.com/maziyarpanahi/openmed/pull/59", "https://github.com/maziyarpanahi/openmed/commit/98724f65df98d7518b9006e6356740aa36c2f224", "https://github.com/maziyarpanahi/openmed/releases/tag/v1.5.2", "https://www.vulncheck.com/advisories/openmed-remote-code-execution-via-pii-model-loading", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-m3v4-v5gx-7wf5"], "repository_advisory_url": null, "severity": "critical", "source_code_location": "github.com/maziyarpanahi/openmed", "summary": "OpenMed vulnerable to remote code injection through privacy-filter model loading path", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-30T21:42:34Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-m3v4-v5gx-7wf5", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "1.5.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "openmed"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "< 1.5.2"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: OpenMed vulnerable to remote code injection through privacy-filter model loading path
